primary_metrics.definition: Days from opening a material decision to choosing a next test or explicit defer/stop call.
primary_metrics.action_if_breached: Create or refresh a decision brief and pick the cheapest evidence step.

primary_metrics.definition: Tasks moved to done with completed_at during the current weekly review window.
primary_metrics.action_if_breached: Reduce WIP and choose one smaller executable slice.

primary_metrics.definition: Count of tasks in this_week or executing compared with the active task WIP limit.
primary_metrics.action_if_breached: Move tasks to waiting/backlog before accepting new work.

primary_metrics.definition: Open tasks with no updated_at movement for seven or more days.
primary_metrics.action_if_breached: Continue, defer, split, or kill each stale task explicitly.

primary_metrics.definition: Repeated private reflections ready to evaluate for a durable OS improvement.
primary_metrics.action_if_breached: Promote only repeated evidence-backed improvements; keep one-off lessons private.

secondary_metrics.definition: Share of AI-proposed actions accepted by the user or accepting role.
secondary_metrics.action_if_breached: Tighten task contracts and add evidence-review gates.

secondary_metrics.definition: Indexed notes missing type/date/frontmatter or likely duplicates.
secondary_metrics.action_if_breached: Rename or annotate the highest-value notes first.
